purpose: .00) turbidity, conductivity, pH, dissolved oxygen, temperature, salinity and chlorophyll. * Funds will be used for website development, programming, and equipment to implement the dashboard and bring water quality data free to the public. A long term goal is to use this dashboard to start conversations with other organizations about inputting their data, to give a greater snapshot of the health of the river as a whole.
